title: Crude Glass
description: Vanilla glass looks impossibly perfect for being crafted from a cobblestone furnace; so, here's a more reasonably imperfect version.
body:
Crude Glass - Now glass will look perfectly imperfect!
Since there's no way Steve (or anyone for that matter) will be making the most high quality, crystal clear, flawless glass you've ever seen- inside a tiny cobblestone furnace... - This resource pack heavily depends on either [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/project/3qAYkBMB) or [Translucent Glass](https://modrinth.com/project/AJzlbbzZ)!
If they're not installed, normal glass blocks will become fully opaque. (Stained glass will look as intended) Connected textures support will be added in the futureTM. ---
[ALT text] A screenshot of a glass shop showcasing the resource pack, Crude Glass.
